site.title: Celestia Island
site.description: An independent open-source organization exploring the frontiers of systems engineering

group.toolsDesc: Allowing agents to engage with the real world

entelecheia.name: Entelecheia
entelecheia.description: An exec-only multi-agent platform for safety-critical industrial control — the LLM only orchestrates, all real work runs through typed pipelines and MCP tools.

shittim.name: Shittim Chest
shittim.description: The interactive face of Entelecheia — a streaming chat UI, a control panel for permissions and config, and desktop and mobile clients.

tairitsu.name: Tairitsu
tairitsu.description: Build full web apps on a single WASI runtime — write UI and server in Rust, compile to WASI components, deploy anywhere.

hikari.name: Hikari
hikari.description: A polished component library that runs on the same WASI runtime as your backend — no wasm-bindgen, no JS glue.

aoba.name: Aoba
aoba.description: Inspect, test, and simulate Modbus devices from the terminal — connect to real hardware or spin up virtual ones.

kirino.name: Kirino
kirino.tagline: Trait-based auth, RBAC, and trust scoring
kirino.description: A generic Rust auth and authorization framework with full RBAC and a dynamic trust-scoring layer.

ratatui-markdown.name: Ratatui Markdown
ratatui-markdown.tagline: Markdown and diagrams for TUI apps
ratatui-markdown.description: Markdown rendering, syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagrams, and collapsible trees — all on ratatui.

yuuka.name: Yuuka
yuuka.description: A proc-macro that generates deeply nested structs and enums from a compact DSL, with serde wiring.

ichika.name: Ichika
ichika.description: Define multi-stage processing pipelines from closures — the macro generates all threading and channels.

hifumi.name: Hifumi
hifumi.description: A serialization library that generates older-version structs and migrations from version attributes.

noa.name: Noa
noa.description: Per-agent workspaces, append-only logs, and git protocol compatibility — designed for agents that branch and rewrite constantly.

evernight.name: Evernight
evernight.tagline: Industrial protocols, bridged to the cloud
evernight.description: Screen streaming, SSH/VNC/RDP, and industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, CAN) — the bridge between cloud agents and physical devices.

aris.name: ARIS
aris.description: A browser engine derived from servo — embed it as a Rust library or run it standalone, with C++ components replaced by pure Rust.

kei.name: KEI
kei.tagline: Rust OS kernel for edge devices
kei.description: A Rust OS kernel for ARM64 and RISC-V edge devices, derived from Asterinas, with industrial drivers and a no_std sensor library.

lagrange.name: Lagrange
lagrange.description: Turn a folder of Markdown into a static, multilingual docs site — no JS framework, no Node toolchain.

kou.name: Kou
kou.description: PTY management and a VT100/ANSI screen emulator in one library and CLI.

malkuth.name: Malkuth
malkuth.description: Graceful shutdown, health probes, coordination locks, and rolling updates for long-running Rust services.

seia.name: Seia
seia.description: A unified library and CLI to route one query across many search backends and merge the results.

shirabe.name: Shirabe
shirabe.description: Drive any CDP-speaking browser through one Rust engine — it even pins a Chrome build for you.
